name: Oriental One-Pot Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 Tablespoons Rice Wine Vinegar or Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 14 pieces.
2. Marinate overnight in soy sauce, wine, garlic, ginger, and sesame oil.
3. Heat the peanut oil in a large deep skillet. Add the chicken (reserve the marinade) and brown well on all sides.
4. Add the peppers and onions. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add the rice and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Add the water and leftover marinade. Cover and cook until the liquid is absorbed.
7. Turn the mixture from top to bottom.
8. Add the scallions, snow peas, and waterchestnuts. Stir in sesame oil to taste.
9. Recover and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
